name: zturret_free_all_runtimes
description: zTurret_System::FreeAllRuntimes shuts down and deletes each turret runtime, clears runtime state, releases the loaded definition tree, deletes the callback node, and returns zero.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?FreeAllRuntimes@zTurret_System@@YAHXZ at 0x437dc0 still fails: 66 unmasked mismatches, 56 relocation bytes masked, 9 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 133 bytes, VC object symbol size 144 bytes.

Reviewed difference is loop-register and source-shape drift in the runtime deletion loop: original keeps the loop index in edi and reloads the runtime pointer from the current list slot, while current source uses a temporary runtime pointer and VC allocates ebx for the loop index. The native smoke verifies runtime shutdown/delete, list-slot clearing, runtime count reset, and the wrapper shutdown path.
